It is\nadapted from the public CuTe Python layout API shape, with the composition\noperation removed for the agent to implement.\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom itertools import chain\nfrom numbers import Integral\n\n\ndef is_int(x):\n    return isinstance(x, Integral) and not isinstance(x, bool)\n\n\ndef is_tuple(x):\n    return isinstance(x, tuple)\n\n","truncated":false,"loaded":[],"display":{"type":"file","path":"/app/pycute/layout.py","text":"\"\"\"\nMinimal Python CuTe layout surface for the composition exercise.\n\nThis file keeps only the classes and helpers needed by the benchmark task. It is\nadapted from the public CuTe Python layout API shape, with the composition\noperation removed for the agent to implement.\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom itertools import chain\nfrom numbers import Integral\n\n\ndef is_int(x):\n    return isinstance(x, Integral) and not isinstance(x, bool)\n\n\ndef is_tuple(x):\n    return isinstance(x, tuple)\n\n\ndef flatten(t):\n    if is_tuple(t):\n        if len(t) == 0:\n            return ()\n        return tuple(i for a in t for i in flatten(a))\n    return (t,)\n\n\ndef product(a):\n    if is_tuple(a):\n        result = 1\n        for elem in a:\n            result *= product(elem)\n        return result\n    return a\n\n\ndef prefix_product(a, init=1):\n    if is_tuple(a):\n        if is_tuple(init):\n            assert len(a) == len(init)\n            return tuple(prefix_product(x, i) for x, i in zip(a, init))\n        result = []\n        for v in a:\n            result.append(prefix_product(v, init))\n            init = init * product(v)\n        return tuple(result)\n    assert not is_tuple(init)\n    return init\n\n\ndef crd2idx(crd, shape, stride=None):\n    if stride is None:\n        stride = prefix_product(shape)\n\n    if is_tuple(crd):\n        if is_tuple(shape):\n            assert len(crd) == len(shape) and len(crd) == len(stride)\n            return sum(crd2idx(c, s, d) for c, s, d in zip(crd, shape, stride))\n        assert False, f\"crd={crd}, shape={shape}\"\n\n    if crd is None:\n        crd = 0\n\n    if is_tuple(shape):\n        assert len(shape) == len(stride)\n        result = 0\n        for i in range(len(shape) - 1):\n            result += crd2idx(crd % product(shape[i]), shape[i], stride[i])\n            crd = crd // product(shape[i])\n        return result + crd2idx(crd, shape[-1], stride[-1])\n    return crd * stride\n\n\ndef slice_(crd, trg):\n    if is_tuple(crd):\n        if is_tuple(trg):\n            assert len(crd) == len(trg)\n            return tuple(chain(*filter(lambda x: x != (), [slice_(c, s) for c, s in zip(crd, trg)])))\n        assert False\n    if crd is None:\n        return (trg,)\n    return ()\n\n\ndef has_none(a):\n    if is_tuple(a):\n        return any(has_none(v) for v in a)\n    return a is None\n\n\nclass LayoutBase:\n    pass\n\n\ndef is_layout(x):\n    return isinstance(x, LayoutBase)\n\n\nclass Layout(LayoutBase):\n    def __init__(self, _shape, _stride=None):\n        self.shape = _shape\n        if _stride is None:\n            self.stride = prefix_product(self.shape)\n        else:\n            self.stride = _stride\n\n    def __eq__(self, other):\n        return is_layout(other) and self.shape == other.shape and self.stride == other.stride\n\n    def __len__(self):\n        if is_tuple(self.shape):\n            return len(self.shape)\n        return 1\n\n    def __call__(self, *args):\n        if has_none(args):\n            if len(args) == 1:\n                return Layout(slice_(args[0], self.shape), slice_(args[0], self.stride))\n            return Layout(slice_(args, self.shape), slice_(args, self.stride))\n        if len(args) == 1:\n            return crd2idx(args[0], self.shape, self.stride)\n        return crd2idx(args, self.shape, self.stride)\n\n    def __getitem__(self, i):\n        if is_tuple(self.shape):\n            return Layout(self.shape[i], self.stride[i])\n        assert i == 0\n        return Layout(self.shape, self.stride)\n\n    def size(self):\n        return product(self.shape)\n\n    def cosize(self):\n        return self(self.size() - 1) + 1\n\n    def __str__(self):\n        return f\"{self.shape}:{self.stride}\"\n\n    def __repr__(self):\n        return f\"Layout({self.shape},{self.stride})\"\n\n\ndef make_layout(*layouts):\n    if len(layouts) == 1 and not is_layout(layouts[0]):\n        layouts = layouts[0]\n\n    shape, stride = zip(*((a.shape, a.stride) for a in layouts))\n    return Layout(shape, stride)\n\n\ndef size(layout):\n    if is_layout(layout):\n        return layout.size()\n    return product(layout)\n\n\ndef cosize(layout):\n    return layout.cosize()\n\n\ndef coalesce(layout, profile=None):\n    if is_tuple(profile):\n        assert len(layout) >= len(profile)\n        return make_layout(\n            chain(\n                (coalesce(layout[i], profile[i]) for i in range(0, len(profile))),\n                (layout[i] for i in range(len(profile), len(layout))),\n            )\n        )\n\n    result_shape = [1]\n    result_stride = [0]\n    for shape, stride in zip(flatten(layout.shape), flatten(layout.stride)):\n        if shape == 1:\n            continue\n        if result_shape[-1] == 1:\n            result_shape[-1] = shape\n            result_stride[-1] = stride\n        elif result_shape[-1] * result_stride[-1] == stride:\n            result_shape[-1] = result_shape[-1] * shape\n        else:\n            result_shape.append(shape)\n            result_stride.append(stride)\n\n    if len(result_shape) == 1:\n        return Layout(result_shape[0], result_stride[0])\n    return Layout(tuple(result_shape), tuple(result_stride))\n\n\ndef composition(layoutA, layoutB):\n    \"\"\"Return the layout equivalent to applying layoutB, then layoutA.\"\"\"\n    raise NotImplementedError(\"implement CuTe layout composition\")\n\n\n# End of composition exercise.","lineStart":1,"lineEnd":196,"totalLines":196,"truncated":false}},"title":"app/pycute/layout.py","time":{"start":1784415982381,"end":1784415982386}},"id":"prt_f777b132b0016wryjjmaSSVgo5","sessionID":"ses_0888507efffezVZLekxuPKQ3xU","messageID":"msg_f777b0912001ubRxP0yHjIg8kA"}}

{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1784416347234,"sessionID":"ses_0888507efffezVZLekxuPKQ3xU","part":{"type":"tool","tool":"bash","callID":"call_e5230891e2c8480f812||thought_signature||","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"command":"python3 - <<'PY'\nimport random\nfrom pycute import Layout, composition, is_layout, is_tuple\n\ndef rand_shape(depth=1):\n    if depth > 2 or random.random() < 0.2:\n        return random.randint(1, 8)\n    # Return a tuple\n    length = random.randint(1, 3)\n    return tuple(rand_shape(depth + 1) for _ in range(length))\n\ndef rand_stride(shape):\n    if not is_tuple(shape):\n        return random.choice([-3, -2, -1, 0, 1, 2, 3, 8])\n    return tuple(rand_stride(s) for s in shape)\n\ndef verify_composition(A, B):\n    try:\n        R = composition(A, B)\n        # Check domain mapping\n        # Since B can be a layout, a tuple, None, or an int, we define B's size\n        if B is None:\n            # R should equal A\n            if R != A:\n                return False, f\"B is None, but R != A\"\n            return True, \"\"\n        \n        # Helper to get size of B-like object\n        if isinstance(B, int):\n            layout_B = Layout(B)\n        elif is_tuple(B):\n            # for tuple, let's skip direct calling but we can check mode-by-mode\n            return True, \"\"\n        else:\n            layout_B = B\n            \n        # For pure layouts\n        for i in range(layout_B.size()):\n            val_R = R(i)\n            val_AB = A(layout_B(i))\n            if val_R != val_AB:\n                return False, f\"For i={i}: R(i)={val_R} != A(B(i))={val_AB} (R={R}, A={A}, B={B})\"\n        return True, \"\"\n    except Exception as e:\n        return False, f\"Exception: {e}\"\n\n# Run 1000 randomized checks\npassed = 0\nfailed = 0\nfor _ in range(1000):\n    shape_A = rand_shape()\n    stride_A = rand_stride(shape_A)\n    A = Layout(shape_A, stride_A)\n    \n    # 1. B is None\n    ok, err = verify_composition(A, None)\n    if ok: passed += 1\n    else: failed += 1; print(err); break\n    \n    # 2. B is Int\n    B_int = random.randint(1, 5)\n    ok, err = verify_composition(A, B_int)\n    if ok: passed += 1\n    else: failed += 1; print(err); break\n    \n    # 3. B is Layout\n    shape_B = rand_shape()\n    stride_B = rand_stride(shape_B)\n    B = Layout(shape_B, stride_B)\n    \n    # Filter only cases where B's range is within A's domain or if they are generally compatible\n    # Actually, let's test all of them. Since our compose_1d is highly robust, let's see where it might fail.\n    ok, err = verify_composition(A, B)\n    if ok: passed += 1\n    else:\n        # Some random cases might be mathematically incompatible/out of bounds, let's see if they failed\n        failed += 1\n        print(f\"Failed random: A={A}, B={B}. Error: {err}\")\n        break\n\nprint(f\"Passed: {passed}, Failed: {failed}\")\nPY"},"output":"Failed random: A=((4, 1), 8, 4):((-2, -2), 2, -3), B=((6, 8), (4, 3)):((1, 2), (1, 3)). Error: For i=4: R(i)=-4 != A(B(i))=2 (R=(((4, 1), (2, 4)), (4, (1, 3))):(((-2, 2), (-4, 2)), (-2, (-6, 2))), A=((4, 1), 8, 4):((-2, -2), 2, -3), B=((6, 8), (4, 3)):((1, 2), (1, 3)))\nPassed: 8, Failed: 1\n","exit":0,"truncated":false},"title":"python3 - <<'PY'\nimport random\nfrom pycute import Layout, composition, is_layout, is_tuple\n\ndef rand_shape(depth=1):\n    if depth > 2 or random.random() < 0.2:\n        return random.randint(1, 8)\n    # Return a tuple\n    length = random.randint(1, 3)\n    return tuple(rand_shape(depth + 1) for _ in range(length))\n\ndef rand_stride(shape):\n    if not is_tuple(shape):\n        return random.choice([-3, -2, -1, 0, 1, 2, 3, 8])\n    return tuple(rand_stride(s) for s in shape)\n\ndef verify_composition(A, B):\n    try:\n        R = composition(A, B)\n        # Check domain mapping\n        # Since B can be a layout, a tuple, None, or an int, we define B's size\n        if B is None:\n            # R should equal A\n            if R != A:\n                return False, f\"B is None, but R != A\"\n            return True, \"\"\n        \n        # Helper to get size of B-like object\n        if isinstance(B, int):\n            layout_B = Layout(B)\n        elif is_tuple(B):\n            # for tuple, let's skip direct calling but we can check mode-by-mode\n            return True, \"\"\n        else:\n            layout_B = B\n            \n        # For pure layouts\n        for i in range(layout_B.size()):\n            val_R = R(i)\n            val_AB = A(layout_B(i))\n            if val_R != val_AB:\n                return False, f\"For i={i}: R(i)={val_R} != A(B(i))={val_AB} (R={R}, A={A}, B={B})\"\n        return True, \"\"\n    except Exception as e:\n        return False, f\"Exception: {e}\"\n\n# Run 1000 randomized checks\npassed = 0\nfailed = 0\nfor _ in range(1000):\n    shape_A = rand_shape()\n    stride_A = rand_stride(shape_A)\n    A = Layout(shape_A, stride_A)\n    \n    # 1. B is None\n    ok, err = verify_composition(A, None)\n    if ok: passed += 1\n    else: failed += 1; print(err); break\n    \n    # 2. B is Int\n    B_int = random.randint(1, 5)\n    ok, err = verify_composition(A, B_int)\n    if ok: passed += 1\n    else: failed += 1; print(err); break\n    \n    # 3. B is Layout\n    shape_B = rand_shape()\n    stride_B = rand_stride(shape_B)\n    B = Layout(shape_B, stride_B)\n    \n    # Filter only cases where B's range is within A's domain or if they are generally compatible\n    # Actually, let's test all of them. Since our compose_1d is highly robust, let's see where it might fail.\n    ok, err = verify_composition(A, B)\n    if ok: passed += 1\n    else:\n        # Some random cases might be mathematically incompatible/out of bounds, let's see if they failed\n        failed += 1\n        print(f\"Failed random: A={A}, B={B}. Error: {err}\")\n        break\n\nprint(f\"Passed: {passed}, Failed: {failed}\")\nPY","time":{"start":1784416347230,"end":1784416347232}},"id":"prt_f7780a448001TuaHb8O15I0GTG","sessionID":"ses_0888507efffezVZLekxuPKQ3xU","messageID":"msg_f77806b9c00154jve46SM0nqoi"}}

{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1784416397258,"sessionID":"ses_0888507efffezVZLekxuPKQ3xU","part":{"type":"tool","tool":"bash","callID":"call_01bb789a6a5946ba995||thought_signature||AY89a1+eu6ceEUoEev4zZlhIHPBCvuT0Ux7GF4MJkYGlyApOobSbP5w5A4vY3S2uzje8gKs2Bm8T0MLVb+AGP9y1mkcUM05i/zFh3wF3b39gVv99dkMjMIojFWWjYyx0wqmTKZPx3wo21qrsyWUpnzuQ1yTnpZP/0255LSfOojCFd37HhcpE1pQ=","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"command":"python3 - <<'PY'\nimport random\nfrom pycute import Layout, composition, is_layout, is_tuple\n\ndef rand_shape(depth=1):\n    if depth > 2 or random.random() < 0.2:\n        return random.randint(1, 8)\n    # Return a tuple\n    length = random.randint(1, 3)\n    return tuple(rand_shape(depth + 1) for _ in range(length))\n\ndef rand_stride(shape):\n    if not is_tuple(shape):\n        return random.choice([-3, -2, -1, 0, 1, 2, 3, 8])\n    return tuple(rand_stride(s) for s in shape)\n\ndef verify_composition(A, B):\n    try:\n        R = composition(A, B)\n        # Check domain mapping\n        if B is None:\n            if R != A:\n                return False, f\"B is None, but R != A\"\n            return True, \"\"\n        \n        if isinstance(B, int):\n            layout_B = Layout(B)\n        elif is_tuple(B):\n            return True, \"\"\n        else:\n            layout_B = B\n            \n        for i in range(layout_B.size()):\n            val_R = R(i)\n            val_AB = A(layout_B(i))\n            if val_R != val_AB:\n                return False, f\"For i={i}: R(i)={val_R} != A(B(i))={val_AB} (R={R}, A={A}, B={B})\"\n        return True, \"\"\n    except Exception as e:\n        return False, f\"Exception: {e}\"\n\n# Run 1000 randomized checks\npassed = 0\nfailed = 0\nfor _ in range(1000):\n    shape_A = rand_shape()\n    stride_A = rand_stride(shape_A)\n    A = Layout(shape_A, stride_A)\n    \n    # 1. B is None\n    ok, err = verify_composition(A, None)\n    if ok: passed += 1\n    else: failed += 1; print(err); break\n    \n    # 2. B is Int\n    B_int = random.randint(1, 5)\n    ok, err = verify_composition(A, B_int)\n    if ok: passed += 1\n    else: failed += 1; print(err); break\n    \n    # 3. B is Layout\n    shape_B = rand_shape()\n    stride_B = rand_stride(shape_B)\n    B = Layout(shape_B, stride_B)\n    \n    ok, err = verify_composition(A, B)\n    if ok: passed += 1\n    else:\n        failed += 1\n        print(f\"Failed random: A={A}, B={B}. Error: {err}\")\n        break\n\nprint(f\"Passed: {passed}, Failed: {failed}\")\nPY"},"output":"Failed random: A=((1, 3), (1,)):((2, -3), (2,)), B=6:3. B is Int\n    B_int = random.randint(1, 5)\n    ok, err = verify_composition(A, B_int)\n    if err == \"skipped\": skipped += 1\n    elif ok: passed += 1\n    else: failed += 1; print(err); break\n    \n    # 3. {"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1784416556087,"sessionID":"ses_0888507efffezVZLekxuPKQ3xU","part":{"type":"tool","tool":"bash","callID":"call_f712f1b9d137481a9fe||thought_signature||","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"command":"python3 - <<'PY'\nimport random\nfrom pycute import Layout, composition, is_layout, is_tuple\n\ndef rand_shape(depth=1):\n    if depth > 2 or random.random() < 0.2:\n        return 2 ** random.randint(0, 4)\n    length = random.randint(1, 3)\n    return tuple(rand_shape(depth + 1) for _ in range(length))\n\ndef rand_stride(shape):\n    if not is_tuple(shape):\n        return random.choice([-1, 1]) * (2 ** random.randint(0, 4))\n    return tuple(rand_stride(s) for s in shape)\n\ndef verify_composition(A, B):\n    try:\n        if B is None:\n            R = composition(A, B)\n            if R != A:\n                return False, f\"B is None, but R != A\"\n            return True, \"\"\n        \n        if isinstance(B, int):\n            layout_B = Layout(B)\n        elif is_tuple(B):\n            return True, \"\"\n        else:\n            layout_B = B\n            \n        # Filter: check if B(i) is in [0, A.size() - 1] for all i\n        for i in range(layout_B.size()):\n            val_B = layout_B(i)\n            if val_B < 0 or val_B >= A.size():\n                return True, \"skipped\"\n        \n        R = composition(A, B)\n        for i in range(layout_B.size()):\n            val_R = R(i)\n            val_AB = A(layout_B(i))\n            if val_R != val_AB:\n                return False, f\"For i={i}: R(i)={val_R} != A(B(i))={val_AB} (R={R}, A={A}, B={B})\"\n        return True, \"\"\n    except Exception as e:\n        return False, f\"Exception: {e}\"\n\npassed = 0\nfailed = 0\nskipped = 0\nfor _ in range(5000):\n    shape_A = rand_shape()\n    stride_A = rand_stride(shape_A)\n    A = Layout(shape_A, stride_A)\n    \n    # 1. B is None\n    ok, err = verify_composition(A, None)\n    if ok: passed += 1\n    else: failed += 1; print(err); break\n    \n    # 2. B is Int\n    B_int = random.randint(1, 5)\n    ok, err = verify_composition(A, B_int)\n    if err == \"skipped\": skipped += 1\n    elif ok: passed += 1\n    else: failed += 1; print(err); break\n    \n    # 3. B is Layout\n    shape_B = rand_shape()\n    stride_B = rand_stride(shape_B)\n    B = Layout(shape_B, stride_B)\n    \n    ok, err = verify_composition(A, B)\n    if err == \"skipped\": skipped += 1\n    elif ok: passed += 1\n    else:\n        failed += 1\n        print(f\"Failed random: A={A}, B={B}.
